case_title: ROMANO, IGNACIO S. VS RICARDO, ERWIM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $567.34 FILED BY ROMANO, IGNACIO S. AS TO DEFENDANT RICARDO, ERWIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RICARDO, ERWIM
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES SUBMITTED FOR SIGNATURE. (SPANISH INTERPRETER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMANO, IGNACIO S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICARDO, ERWIM $567.34 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $592.34, DEFT TO PAY PLFT BY MONEY ORDER AS FOLLOWS:$197.44 BY 10/15/96; $197.44 BY 10/30/96 AND $197.44 BY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
11/15/96. IF DEFT SENDS MONEY ORDER BY MAIL THEN PAYMENTS MUST BE POSTMARKED BY DUE DATE. DEFT ADMITS HE OWES MONEY TO PLFT.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED.
ORDER OF THE COURT TO SET ASIDE TERMS TO ERWIN RICARDO RETURNED MOVED NOT FORWARDABLE.
